mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_accounts ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_accounts WHERE role = #{role}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_accounts (username, display_name, password_hash, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_accounts SET username=#{username}, display_name=#{displayName}, password_hash=#{passwordHash}, role=#{role}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
